# Foundations {#part-foundations .unnumbered}

This part establishes the vocabulary used throughout the rest of the book.
It starts with the high-level idea of GPT-style models, then introduces the compact math notation needed to read the diagrams and Python code.

- In @sec-ch01-introduction, you will see what a GPT model does and how the main pieces fit together.
- In @sec-ch02-notation, you will learn the vector, matrix, probability, and calculus notation used in the later chapters.
